0xa095ac19.name: metaDelegate
0xa095ac19.reason: relayer-submit: on-chain consumer of an off-chain EIP-712 Delegate signature (v,r,s). The delegator (signer) risk is captured at the off-chain typed-data Delegate sign — see signed_structs.Delegate (cover) — not at this relayer-submitted tx. Mirrors Morpho setAuthorizationWithSig EXCLUDE.

0x657f0cde.name: metaDelegateByType
0x657f0cde.reason: relayer-submit: on-chain consumer of an off-chain EIP-712 DelegateByType signature (v,r,s).
